KeywordLists.Keywords: + - * / ** < > = <> not and or length; le; position; pos; po; format; numeric actual actual; back back; every every; from from; until until; group group; last last; total total; numeric\
determine auto.entry; ae; auto.array; aua; auto.entry; ae; auto.array; aua; begin.case; bc; begin.edit; begin.loop; bg; determine; dt; do.when; dw; look.up; lu;
auto;write&clear auto;write end; end.edit; end.case; ec; end.exit; ee; end.no.print; enp;

actmth glb. gs input-date ispec maint today todays-date-num todays-day todays-month todays-month-num todays-year tranno daynum uk-alpha us-alpha in-alpha dd-mm-yy dd-mm-ccyy dd-mmm-yy dd-mmm-ccyy ddmmmyy ddmmmccyy ddmmyy ddmmccyy mm-dd-yy mm-dd-ccyy mmddyy mmddccyy mmm-dd-yy mmm-dd-ccyy mmmddyy mmmddccyy yy-mm-dd ccyy-mm-dd yy-mmm-dd ccyy-mmm-dd yyddd ccyyddd yymmdd ccyymmdd yymmmdd ccyymmmdd today weekno
